calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to January 9, 2024 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil
Off Calendar Oct-10-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JOSEPH SHASHATY, Esq. of Lalezary Law Firm (Tel: 310-510-8888) as movant/counsel-of-record for plaintiff Eduardo Garcia Suarez.

Hearing Re: Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel As To Plaintiff Eduardo Garcia Suarez.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

Matter discussed and submitted. The Court rules as follows: Attorney Joseph Shashaty's motion to be relieved as counsel is granted.

Movant is to prepare and submit a proposed order using the mandatory Judicial Council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
